title: meleemajors.gg tournaments API
description: Public listing of upcoming Super Smash Bros. Melee majors, as served from https://meleemajors.gg/api/v1/tournaments.json. Regenerated on every site build.

lastUpdated.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this payload was generated. Updates on every site build, not only when tournament data changes.

tournaments.description: All tracked tournaments, ordered chronologically by start date (soonest first).

name.description: Human-readable tournament name as displayed on the site (e.g. "Riptide 2026", "Pat's House 5").

start.gg-tournament-name.description: Internal slug-like identifier derived from the tournament's start.gg URL. Stable across builds and safe to use as a key. Note: contains a literal '.' so JS consumers must use bracket notation (obj["start.gg-tournament-name"]).

date-string.description: Pre-formatted human-readable date range intended for display (e.g. "April 10 - April 12"). Format is not machine-parseable; use start-timestamp for programmatic date handling.

start-timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the tournament begins (typically the first day's check-in or first match). UTC-offset is the event's local offset.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name for the tournament venue. Pair with start-timestamp to render local times.

players.description: Fixed-length list of the top 8 seeded/notable entrants, ordered by seed. Slots that have not yet been announced contain the literal string "TBD" (which is currently indistinguishable from a player whose tag is literally "TBD").

items.description: Player tag, or the literal string "TBD" if the slot is unannounced.

entrants.description: Total registered entrants in the main singles bracket, as a decimal integer encoded in a string. May be the literal string "TBD" when registration has not opened or the count is not yet known, or an empty string in rare cases.

city-and-state.description: Short locality string for display (city + state/region). Free-form; format varies by country.

maps-link.description: Google Maps search URL for the venue address. Derived from full-address.

full-address.description: Full postal address of the venue, as provided by the organizer. Free-form.
examples: Price Center, La Jolla, CA 92093, USA

start.gg-url.description: Canonical start.gg URL for the main Melee singles event. Note: key contains a literal '.', so JS consumers must use bracket notation.

stream-url.description: Primary livestream URL (typically Twitch or YouTube). Empty string if no stream has been announced.

schedule-url.description: URL to the published event schedule, if any. Empty string if unavailable.

image-url.description: Absolute URL to the tournament's promotional card image hosted on meleemajors.gg.

top8-start-time.description: Announced start time of Top 8, in the organizer's preferred format. Free-form; empty string if not yet scheduled.
